creator: mail@henningkessler.de
text:
I am trying to install unifi8 from the scratch in a 13.3p2 jail but I can't make it start. I have set 

`sysrc unifi_enable=YES`
`sysrc mongod_enable=YES`

and when I run `service unifi start` it throughs no errors but it does not run. The logs are empty/non-existent in `/usr/local/share/java/unifi/logs`

any ideas? Until unifi8 8.0.24 this was working without any issues.
